response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matches. The Reference JSON provided lyrics for 'Dancing Reed' (ending part) and mentioned 'Dawn Blue'. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized for the 'Dancing Reed' ending; manual transcription and translation were performed for the talk segment and 'Dawn Blue' lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synchronized to vocal bursts; aggressive truncation was used for rapid transitions in the talk segment. Visual titles were included during instrumental breaks.

subtitles.original: そうだよー。楽しい、生ライブ！

subtitles.original: Dawn Blue
subtitles.english: [Song: Dawn Blue]

subtitles.original: ずっと同じ毎日に 迷いがあっても
subtitles.english: Even if there's hesitation in the same everyday life,

subtitles.original: 気付かない振りをしていたんだ
subtitles.english: I was pretending not to notice.

subtitles.original: あのちょっとの勇気が まだ出せなくて
subtitles.english: I couldn't yet find that little bit of courage,

subtitles.original: まどろみの中で 彷徨っていた
subtitles.english: and I was wandering in a slumber.

subtitles.original: 夜空に浮かぶ 星に願いをかけるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll make a wish on a star floating in the night sky.

subtitles.original: I hope 抱いてる夢を 絶対諦めたくない
subtitles.english: I hope... I never want to give up on the dream I hold.

subtitles.original: 走り出すから
subtitles.english: Because I'm starting to run.

subtitles.original: 追いかけて 今 あの瞬間さ
subtitles.english: Chasing it now, this is the moment.

subtitles.original: 見たことのないストーリー 進んでいくんだ
subtitles.english: A story I've never seen before is moving forward.

subtitles.original: いつの日にかきっと 描いた世界へ
subtitles.english: So that someday I can surely...

subtitles.original: 辿り着けるように
subtitles.english: reach the world I envisioned.

subtitles.original: Let go of the days of traumatic sorrow
subtitles.english: Let go of the days of traumatic sorrow
